stemHtml: According to ICAO Annex 9 and in the case of customs clearance, when a passenger's baggage is delayed or mishandled, his/her unaccompanied baggage will...

options.a: NOT be loaded in the cargo hold and returned to the owner because baggage must travel with his/her owner.
options.b: NOT be cleared and will be subject to the taxes of the Contracting State.
options.d: be cleared if it weighs less than 12 kg.
